system.effect: Modifies and controls the form, color, or intensity of light in a 60-foot radius. If cast at Light-based beings, they must pass a MR Check with a Difficulty of 80 or fall under the control of the caster. A creature can only repeat the check if ordered to do something against its nature.
system.addedEffect: +30 feet to radius and +5 to MR Difficulty.
